CRI Scanner — Question UI Options

Choose the feel that fits CRI · Scroll to compare all 6

A · Emoji Spotlight

Big Emoji + 2 Words

Instagram Story Poll. Huge emoji, 2-word label. Tap = auto-advance. Zero reading.

⚡ Fastest📱 Mobile-firstLess context
B · Icon Tile Grid

SVG Icon + Short Label

Square glass tiles with icons. Game character select / Duolingo feel. Glowing selection.

⚡ Fast✨ Premium🎮 Game-like
C · Swipe / Flip Card

One Option Per Screen

One card fills the screen. Arrows to browse. Tap to select. Tinder / flashcard feel.

🎯 Max focusSlower to compare
D · Cinema Spotlight

Giant Question + Pills

Fullscreen cinematic question. 4 glowing pill buttons. No header. Most dramatic.

🎬 Cinematic✅ No scroll🏆 Fits CRI
E · Chat Bubbles

Conversational Style

Scanner speaks in chat bubbles. User taps reply options. Personal, not a form.

💬 Personal📖 Story-likeMore vertical space
F · Journey Map

Path + Branch Tiles

Horizontal path at top, 6 glowing stations. Choices as branch tiles below.

🗺️ Shows progress🎮 NarrativeMost complex
My pick for CRI: Option D (Cinema Spotlight) + icon tiles from B as choices.
Big cinematic question · Icon tiles to tap · No reading · No scroll ever.
